mapper.sql: c.category_id, c.category_name, c.category_name_en, c.parent_id, c.category_level, c.sort_order
mapper.select: SELECT , p.category_name as parent_name FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_category p ON c.parent_id = p.category_id WHERE c.category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT , COUNT(e.book_id) as book_count FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.category_id = e.category_id AND e.status = 1 WHERE c.category_level = 1 GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.sort_order DESC, c.category_id ASC

SELECT , COUNT(e.book_id) as book_count FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.category_id = e.category_id AND e.status = 1 WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.sort_order DESC, c.category_id ASC

SELECT
FROM tb_category c ORDER BY c.category_level ASC, c.sort_order DESC, c.category_id ASC

SELECT , p.category_name as parent_name, COUNT(e.book_id) as book_count FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_category p ON c.parent_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.category_id = e.category_id AND e.status = 1 GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.category_level ASC, c.sort_order DESC, c.category_id ASC

SELECT , COUNT(e.book_id) as book_count FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.category_id = e.category_id AND e.status = 1 WHERE c.category_level = 1 GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.sort_order DESC, c.category_id ASC

SELECT , COUNT(e.book_id) as book_count FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.category_id = e.category_id AND e.status = 1 WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.sort_order DESC, c.category_id ASC

SELECT -- 父分类信息 p.category_id, p.category_name, p.category_name_en, p.parent_id, p.category_level, p.sort_order, COUNT(DISTINCT pe.book_id) as book_count, -- 子分类信息 c.category_id as child_category_id, c.category_name as child_category_name, c.category_name_en as child_category_name_en, c.parent_id as child_parent_id, c.category_level as child_category_level, c.sort_order as child_sort_order, COUNT(DISTINCT ce.book_id) as child_book_count FROM tb_category p LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook pe ON p.category_id = pe.category_id AND pe.status = 1 LEFT JOIN tb_ebook ce ON c.category_id = ce.category_id AND ce.status = 1 WHERE p.category_level = 1 GROUP BY p.category_id, c.category_id ORDER BY p.sort_order DESC, p.category_id ASC, c.sort_order DESC, c.category_id ASC

SELECT , COUNT(e.book_id) as book_count FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.category_id = e.category_id AND e.status = 1 GROUP BY c.category_id HAVING book_count > 0 ORDER BY book_count DESC, c.sort_order DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT , p.category_name as parent_name, COUNT(e.book_id) as book_count FROM tb_category c LEFT JOIN tb_category p ON c.parent_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.category_id = e.category_id AND e.status = 1 WHERE c.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryName}, '%') OR c.category_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryName}, '%') GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.category_level ASC, c.sort_order DESC
